title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 - 1 - 2017: Finished Roman Directory.

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on the evening of August 1, 2017, after a long break spent completing his Plattner-Nashby topographical history of ancient Rome — a 172-page directory of roughly 1800 buildings now posted on his website. He recounts a bizarre website bug where chapter links got corrupted en masse, and looks ahead to future website work including adding Flickr photos to ancient history books.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: relieved and energized — feels like being back in open fields after a long slog
baffling and twilight-zone-like; rebuilt it manually and moved on
excited to add Flickr historical photos to ancient books as visual content
so motivated on his research that he barely cares if the pedals arrive this week
